topics.title: Upcoming Marriage Counseling and Musical Performances
topics.summary: The studio discusses an upcoming marriage counseling session with a doctor, the use of prank phone calls involving pre-recorded tapes, and a recent performance by Chris Cornell.

topics.title: Brotherly Fights and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores personal stories regarding religious experiences, past relationships, and the physical altercations between brothers.

topics.title: Howard Stern Show Convention Planning
topics.summary: The studio discusses potential costumes for a fan convention, evaluates Gary Garber's online presence, and touches on personal relationship updates.

topics.title: Marital Conflict and Therapy
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of a man's marriage, his discovery of his wife's emotional connection with another man, and the subsequent impact on their joint therapy sessions.

topics.title: Infidelity and Relationship Counseling
topics.summary: The studio features a caller who shares his experience navigating his wife's emotional affair and the subsequent reconciliation process through therapy.

topics.title: Sopranos Finale and Film Reviews
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with Richard Roper regarding the controversial ending of The Sopranos, his experiences as a film critic, and upcoming superhero cinema.

topics.title: Film Reviews and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on various films including The Hulk and Sophie's Choice, while also addressing personal anecdotes regarding tattoos, celebrity interactions, and the dynamics of film criticism.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Conflict Avoidance
topics.summary: The studio explores the dynamics of a relationship where a lack of conflict is scrutinized by a guest expert who suggests that avoiding arguments can be a symptom of underlying issues.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Personal Defense Mechanisms
topics.summary: The studio explores a couple's relationship dynamics, focusing on themes of perfection, emotional safety, and the personal barriers that prevent full intimacy.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Personal Growth
topics.summary: The studio explores a couple's relationship dynamics, discussing themes of emotional vulnerability, personal growth, and the challenges of navigating mutual expectations.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Future Planning
topics.summary: The studio explores a couple's communication styles, personal boundaries regarding parenting, and the complexities of navigating long-term commitment.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Therapy Session
topics.summary: The studio features a therapy session with Dr. Keith Abelo where the participants discuss their relationship dynamics, personal boundaries, and the complexities of friendship.

topics.title: Consumption of Endangered Species
topics.summary: The studio discusses reports of tigers and gorillas being hunted for meat in China and Africa, leading to a comedic exchange about the taste of gorilla meat and personal appearances.

topics.title: Obesity, Media News, and Science
topics.summary: The studio explores topics ranging from the medical approach to childhood obesity and the death of science television host Don Herbert to reports on military research into a "gay bomb," airport rankings, and public opinions on evolution.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Upcoming Comedy Tour Dates
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news involving David Hasselhoff, Jennifer Aniston, and Paris Hilton before transitioning into a series of upcoming comedy tour announcements.
